EnableTooltip.Name: Enable Token Tooltip
EnableTooltip.Hint: Show tooltips when hovering over tokens

ShowDistance.Name: Show Distance
ShowDistance.Hint: Display distance to selected/targeted tokens in the tooltip

EnablePersistentHUD.Name: Enable Persistent HUD
EnablePersistentHUD.Hint: Show a persistent HUD for owned actors

AutoSetActor.Name: Auto-Set Actor
AutoSetActor.Hint: Automatically set persistent actor when selecting tokens

HUDPosition.Name: HUD Position
HUDPosition.Hint: Position of the persistent HUD on screen

TooltipSide.Name: Tooltip Preferred Side
TooltipSide.Hint: Preferred side for tooltip display relative to the token

ShowStaminaBar.Name: Show Stamina Bar
ShowStaminaBar.Hint: Display stamina points as a separate bar in tooltips and HUD (SF1E only)

ShowClassResource.Name: Show Class Resource
ShowClassResource.Hint: Display class-specific resources like Vanguard Entropy Points or Solarian Stellar Mode (SF1E only)

ShowHeroPoints.Name: Show Hero Points
ShowHeroPoints.Hint: Display Hero Points pips in the HUD and tooltip (SF2E only)

ShowFocusPoints.Name: Show Focus Points
ShowFocusPoints.Hint: Display Focus Points pips in the HUD (SF2E only)

TextSize.Name: Text Size
TextSize.Hint: Adjust the overall text size of the HUD for accessibility (100% is default)
